Privacy
Home/Services

Services

Commercial technology services organized around security, connectivity, and cleaner long-term support.

Opticable focuses first on cameras, secure door access, intercoms, and business WiFi. Cabling, fiber, racks, and network rooms support those systems.

Request a quoteAbout

Commercial technology infrastructure specialists

Opticable installs security cameras, access control, intercoms, commercial WiFi, structured cabling, fiber, and network infrastructure for commercial properties.

Security Camera SystemsAccess Control SystemsWiFi and Wireless NetworksIntercom SystemsStructured CablingFiber Optic InstallationNetwork InfrastructureIP Phone Systems

Services

Core services

Cameras, access control, intercom, and WiFi come first.

Security Camera Systems

Sales, management, and installation of camera systems with PoE, recording, remote viewing, and network coordination.

View service page

Access Control Systems

Door reader wiring, panel support, network connectivity, and secure entry infrastructure.

View service page

WiFi and Wireless Networks

Sales, management, maintenance, installation, and cabling for WiFi networks across buildings, shared areas, events, construction sites, and active sites.

View service page

Intercom Systems

Building entry, gate, and tenant communication systems coordinated with access and network infrastructure.

View service page

Services

Supporting infrastructure

Cabling, fiber, racks, and network rooms support the core systems.

Structured Cabling

Copper, Ethernet, coaxial, labeling, patching, and clean cable organization for commercial spaces.

View service page

Fiber Optic Installation

Fiber backbones, risers, handoff extensions, and high-capacity links for commercial properties.

View service page

Network Infrastructure

Server racks, network rooms, handoff routing, patching, switching support, and infrastructure cleanup.

View service page

IP Phone Systems

Business phone infrastructure, handset connectivity, VoIP-ready cabling, and network support for office communication.

View service page

Services

Supporting scope

Additional infrastructure services often delivered in the same project.

Ethernet cable installation

Copper cabling for workstations, access points, cameras, phones, and business devices.

Coaxial cable installation

Coaxial backbone and specialty runs coordinated with structured cabling and provider handoffs.

Server rack installation

Rack layout, cable management, patching, and cleanup inside MDF and IDF environments.

Internet infrastructure deployment

Demarc extensions, handoff routing, and switching support for new or renovated commercial spaces.

VoIP phone lines

Voice connectivity and handset infrastructure aligned with structured cabling and network hardware.

Project Intake

Need a technology specialist for cameras, secure entry, WiFi, or building communications?

Send a quote request with the property type, required systems, and target timeline.

Request a quoteView all services

Opticable serves businesses and managed properties across Quebec, including Montreal, Laval, Longueuil, the South Shore, the North Shore, and the Laurentians.
